iMocha offers AI-SkillsMatch, a solution to aggregate and refine external talent, delivering highly accurate candidate matches to the organization’s skills architecture and integrating seamlessly with recruitment tech solutions.

Optimize Talent Screening

Streamline the screening process by quickly identifying candidates who meet the specific skill requirements of the job.

Improve 
Candidate Pool

Enhance your success rate of discovering top talent with the perfect skills and experience match.

Objective Hiring Decisions

Make informed and unbiased hiring decisions based on comprehensive skills data and AI-driven insights.

User interface showing a candidate summary card with a profile photo and a skills table with matching status check marks and proficiency bars..webp)

## Find Job-fit Candidates Faster

Transform job requisitions into skills-first architecture, matching candidate data with intelligent profiles using iMocha’s detailed industry-standard ontology.

Learn more

Blue rightward arrow on a black background.

## Leverage Data to Empower Strategic Hiring

Using iMocha’s AI, candidate data converts into intelligent profiles, enabling objective assessment, data-driven recruitment, and hiring for adjacent skills.

Book a demo

Blue rightward arrow on a black background.

Two tables showing skill proficiency: top with match status checkmarks and candidate proficiency bars, bottom a diagram labeled Adjacent Skills with a central node connected to six surrounding nodes..webp)

## Rediscovery & Cross-Fit Intelligence

Automatically surfaces strong or moderate-fit candidates hidden within your existing talent database—reducing sourcing costs and improving time-to-fill.

Learn more

Blue rightward arrow on a black background.
